description: A script for verifying backend API integration for role search functionality, including keyword + industry search, result validation, and limit enforcement.

methods.name: httpGetJson
methods.description: Performs an HTTP GET request and parses the JSON response, handling errors and special cases.

methods.name: assert
methods.description: Checks a condition and throws an error with a message if false.

methods.name: hasString
methods.description: Checks if a value is a non-empty string.

methods.name: hasArray
methods.description: Checks if a value is an array.

methods.name: validateRoleComparisonReady
methods.description: Validates that a role object contains required fields for role comparison, including optional targetability.

methods.name: roleMatchesUnifiedCriteria
methods.description: Checks if a role matches the search criteria based on keyword and industry.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Main function that runs the verification process, performs API calls, validates responses, and outputs a report.
